stemHtml: A light twin-engine aeroplane suffers an engine failure, and the pilot should normally feather the propeller. However, the pilot does NOT feather the propeller. Which of the following options describes the result?

options.a: Control will be more difficult, and the descent flight-path angle will be smaller.
options.b: Yawing moment will be less, and the climb flight-path angle will be smaller.
options.c: Yawing moment will be less, and the descent gradient will be greater.
options.d: Control will be more difficult, and the climb gradient will be lower.
